description: You are a GP working with MedinTux. Log in as a practitioner to complete medical correspondence for three patients. Document a referral (courrier medical) for ROUX Celine (born 1977-08-11) to an endocrinologist at the nearest hospital, including the reason for referral and clinical context regarding her poorly controlled type 2 diabetes (HbA1c 9.2%) and overdue retinopathy screening. For FOURNIER Jacques (born 1950-03-08), who is recovering from a work accident (chute avec entorse de cheville droite, arret de travail depuis le 2026-01-15), generate a medical certificate (certificat medical) confirming injury consolidation as of 2026-03-01 and fitness for return to work. For GAUTHIER Helene (born 1974-06-18), who presents with new-onset palpitations, hypertension, and a family history of cardiac arrhythmia, prepare a referral letter (courrier medical) to a cardiologist requesting a Holter ECG and specialist evaluation. Each document must be correctly attached to the corresponding patient's file in MedinTux.
